title: Generation Models Know Space: Unleashing Implicit 3D Priors for Scene Understanding
reason: Novel paradigm shift leveraging video generation models' implicit 3D knowledge for scene understanding without explicit 3D supervision.

title: Matryoshka Gaussian Splatting
reason: Continuous level-of-detail for 3DGS with stochastic budget training, enabling flexible speed-quality trade-off from a single model.

title: Cubic Discrete Diffusion: Discrete Visual Generation on High-Dimensional Representation Tokens
reason: First discrete generation model for high-dimensional representations, enabling unified understanding and generation with same tokens.

title: NavTrust: Benchmarking Trustworthiness for Embodied Navigation
reason: First unified benchmark for embodied navigation robustness under RGB-Depth corruptions and instruction variations.

title: Bridging Semantic and Kinematic Conditions with Diffusion-based Discrete Motion Tokenizer
reason: Novel three-stage framework combining semantic planning with kinematic control, reducing trajectory error by 10x.

title: SAMA: Factorized Semantic Anchoring and Motion Alignment for Instruction-Guided Video Editing
reason: Factorized approach achieving state-of-the-art video editing without paired training data, competitive with commercial systems.

title: Under One Sun: Multi-Object Generative Perception of Materials and Illumination
reason: Novel multi-object generative inverse rendering leveraging shared illumination for better material decomposition.

title: FinTradeBench: A Financial Reasoning Benchmark for LLMs
reason: First benchmark integrating company fundamentals and trading signals for comprehensive financial reasoning evaluation.

title: EffectErase: Joint Video Object Removal and Insertion for High-Quality Effect Erasing
reason: Novel effect-aware video object removal with large-scale VOR dataset and reciprocal learning scheme.

title: Nemotron-Cascade 2: Post-Training LLMs with Cascade RL and Multi-Domain On-Policy Distillation
reason: Open 30B MoE model achieving Gold Medal-level performance on IMO, IOI, and ICPC with remarkable intelligence density.
